LB_EMPTY: *Not enough data for this period... Be the first!*
PROFILE_SUBTITLE: Your total profile on the server.
ERR_NO_DATA: You don't have data in the database yet. Write a few messages first!
ERR_NO_DATA_PERIOD: Unfortunately, you have no recorded data for this period.
ERR_STATS_CHANNEL: You can only use this command in the <#{id}> channel!
ERR_ADMIN_ONLY: This command can only be used in the admin channel: <#{id}>
REPORT_EMPTY_HISTORY: No entries in the log yet.
GAME_ADDED: Added: If name contains `{name}`, rank will be: `Player: {suffix}`
GAME_REPORT_EMPTY: No data for the selected period.
DB_RESET_SUCCESS: Database successfully cleared! All activity data removed.
CMD_TOP_DESC: Shows the weekly, monthly or all-time leaderboard.
CMD_ADD_GAME_DESC: Add a new game to automatic rank distribution.
CMD_ADD_GAME_NAME_DESC: Part of the game's name (e.g., Minecraft)
CMD_REMOVE_GAME_DESC: Remove a game from the list.
CMD_GAME_REPORT_DESC: Generate a game popularity report in .txt.
CMD_SYNC_MODE_DESC: Choice: guild (to this server), global (everywhere), copy (copy global here)
CMD_CLEAR_DONE: All registered commands (global and server) have been cleared. You can now use {cmd} to refresh them.
INFO_DESC: Hi! I am a complex activity watcher bot. I track your messages, voice time, Spotify listening, and gaming activities to help you earn points and ranks!
INFO_FEATURES_DESC:
• `/top` & `/me` - Check the server leaderboard and your personal profile card.
• **Weekly Champions** - Compete to be the GodGamer, SpotiViber, or Streamer of the week!
• **Meme Factory** - Share images, videos, or links to earn extra bonus points!
• **Server Veteran** - Tracking your tenure and loyalty to the server.
• **Automatic Game Roles** - Get roles automatically for your favorite games!
• **Inactivity Watcher** - Stay active to avoid the {role} role!
INFO_FOOTER: Use the commands in the {channel} channel!
INFO_DEV_FOOTER_NOTE: Some commands may require a Dev role.
ERR_STATS_NOT_FOUND: Stats channel not found in config! (stats_id)
CMD_SERVER_ANALYSIS_TYPE_DESC: What type of analysis do you want?
CMD_GAME_DETAILS_DESC: Detailed statistics for a specific game (Downloadable TXT).
CMD_STREAM_HISTORY_DESC: Export a TXT report of all recorded stream sessions.
CMD_STREAM_HISTORY_DAYS_DESC: How many days back to search? (Default: 7)
STREAM_HISTORY_EMPTY: No recorded stream sessions found for this period.
STREAM_HISTORY_DONE: Stream history for the last {days} days generated ({count} entries).
CMD_MEMBERSHIP_LOGS_DESC: Export join and leave logs to a TXT file.
MEMBERSHIP_LOG_EMPTY: No membership events found in the database.
CHAMPIONS_FOOTER: Congratulations to the champions! Wear your roles with pride for 1 week!
CHAMPION_HALL_OF_FAME: **NEW HALL OF FAMER:** {name} reached their 5th victory, earning permanent membership!
